programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys - Series 7
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Europe to understand life during the First and Second World Wars. On his travels, he visits Spain, France, Germany, Italy, Sweden, Austria and the Czech Republic, learning about the old empires of Europe swept away by revolution and a dozen new nations that embarked optimistically upon independence.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: Singapore saw a 27 increase in traffic accidents in recent years. We investigate if such accidents are caused by a lack of driving skills or bad attitudes on our roads.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: Arts 21
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: Euromaxx
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: Planet Action S4
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: Adam And Poh's Great Australia Bites
programme.desc: In this series, Adam and Poh are reunited for a culinary road trip through Australia! What is Australian cuisine? Is it meat pies and snot blocks? Is it wallaby and wattle seed? Is it Laksa and pad thai? In this series, Adam and Poh will travel al over Australia uncovering what exactly is Australian cuisine.

programme.title: Lion Mums S3
programme.desc: The all-new Season 3 of Lion Mums will tackle more hot-button issues that pushes the mighty Lion Mums to the fore - GEP prep, schools selection, teenage angst, harassment, sex education, tuition, gaming addiction, work-life balance and more. Can Mums have it all?

programme.title: Mat Yoyo: The New Generation
programme.desc: Ebi, the Tamil Mat Yoyo host, guest stars in this episode. He and Kim introduces some interesting sports, including Dodgeball. Why segment - Why do we need to exercise? Ebi and Kim explain the importance and benefits of exercise. They end the segment by doing the Mat Yoyo mini move- a simple exercise routine done to the Mat Yoyo theme song.

programme.title: Club M.A.G.I.C S2
programme.desc: Ee-or ! Ee-or ! Ee-or ! There's a little 'crisis' on CLUB M.A.G. I .C when someone notices a ' fire' in the club! Of course, it's all pretend fire! Miss P and her Positive Agents show how a fire should be put out with a handheld fire extinguisher. Miss P points out that it's important for everyone to know what to do if they are faced with a fire. So she sends the agents out to see what they can learn about things related to a fire.

programme.title: Tish Tash Spin-Off
programme.desc: Bobby's cookie is stolen by an ant during a garden picnic. Tish imagines shrinking them to ant size, and with Tash, they explore ant tunnels, finding the cookie in the Queen's castle. They let her keep it and ask Rosa to bake more. Rosa then teaches them about ants.

programme.title: Tish Tash Spin-Off
programme.desc: On a hot day, Tish craves ice cream, but Rosa says the freezer must be defrosted first. Tish and Tash imagine exploring a frozen tundra, avoiding ice creatures to find a lolly. Tish enjoys her treat while Pola defrosts the freezer. Rosa teaches the kids about Earth's coldest places.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs S2
programme.desc: In this prequel to the 2009 film, inventor boy Flint Lockwood and reporter girl Sam Sparks as best friends during high school!

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: Season 2 -The Search for Laqua
programme.desc: In order to learn and master Terastallization, Liko, Roy, and Dot have joined the Naranja Academy's "Tera Training"! They meet Clavell, the school's director, and Geeta, the chairwoman of Paldea's Pokmon League as well as the Elite Four of Paldea: Rika, Poppy, Larry , and Hassel. And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.title: Biogirl MJ's Wildlife Treasure Hunt S2
programme.desc: A wildlife series for kids that focuses on one species of animal per episode, exploring the fascinating animal kingdom in Singapore. The series will showcase various species of animals that call Singapore home, Highlighting their unique characteristics, behaviors, and habitats. Through fun visuals and engaging narration, the series aims to educate and inspire young viewers to appreciate and protect the natural world.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Go Rush!!
programme.desc: Twins Yuhi and Yuamu Ohdo believe there's alien life beyond the stars, even though their attempts to prove it have only ended in failure their hard work and dedication are about to pay off when an extraterrestrial finally arrives on Earth!

programme.title: Ice Storm
programme.desc: When a devastating winter storm slams into North Carolina with the lowest recorded temperatures in history, the whole state starts to freeze over. The spread of the freeze continues to grow taken more and more villages, towns and cities down with it and America is now in the grip of a major disaster. As temperatures turn even colder, climatologists and disaster relief experts race to save lives and stop the storm.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals S3
programme.desc: Twelve teams from top hotels, restaurants and small businesses compete to be crowned best patisserie team in Britain. programme.title: 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: 年过半百的乐龄人士在为家庭和事业奉献多年后终于迎来了人生的新篇章那些藏在心底的梦想如今将再次点亮舞台 新系列的节目将延续团战的形式为乐龄朋友们提供一个更多元更有趣的荣誉舞台让大家拥有同样的机会携手走到最后参赛者也可以一起展现真我切磋技艺以歌会友让生活更喜乐安康.

programme.title: 与天地对话
programme.desc: 四名不同背景的艺人包括姜皓文蔡思贝余文乐林盛斌在近乎没有别人帮助的情况下独自走访南也门索科特拉岛澳洲昆士兰大堡礁及北领地红土地区分别探讨人生四个重大思考课题身在逆境应如何自处人生最可怕是什么人生为谁而活性格是否决定命运在渺无人烟的天地之间每位艺人都于最真诚无任何骚扰之下抚心自问来一场真正的与天地对话对自己敞开真正的心扉.

programme.title: 大咖一起来
programme.desc: 大咖一起来 S5延续电台上的热度由当红 DJ 亲自带头发起并挑战各种精彩任务 每一集都真实记录他们面对难关时最真切的反应邀请观众一路陪他们一起突破自我拥抱未知惊喜.

programme.title: 早餐中国 IV
programme.desc: 福建漳州豆花粉丝: 豆花粉丝是福建漳州的一道美食豆花加粉丝可谓是珠联璧合豆花的细嫩和卤味带来的快乐粉丝绝对是美味的加分项保证你吃一次就会记住这个味道重庆荣昌铺盖面: 重庆荣昌铺盖面因为面皮宽大像铺盖所以得名铺盖面从面团上拽下巴掌大小的面片拉扯均匀后下锅煮熟即可出锅配以猪骨鸡汤面滑爽有劲道喝一口汤鲜美无比早餐来一碗整个人从里到外都散发着暖意江西南丰现榨水粉: 听说江西南丰有 三水水粉水酒水豆腐在三水之中尤以水粉最为世人称道作为南丰人可以一天不吃饭但不能一天不嗦粉.

programme.title: 再见明天
programme.desc: 阿彦与凯义不懈地尝试拯救奶妈却每次都比神秘人慢了一步线索指引他们回到公司于是找CHLOE帮忙CHLOE不相信他们但三人竟然在CEO的办公室里找到一间隐藏的房间神秘人竟是他们的CEO HENRYHENRY正对奶妈施虐就在他们试图阻止他时HENRY再次启动了时空循环成功逃脱.

programme.title: 再见明天
programme.desc: CHLOE竟然也被卷入了时空循环但聪明敏锐的她很快适应了这种状况CHLOE不想被困在重复的一天里只能与阿彦和凯义携手对抗HENRY他们想出了一个计划准备逮捕HENRY却在关键时刻被他启动时空循环逃脱了同一天又重新开始但这次阿彦惊讶地发现自己手中竟然握着HENRY的水壶.

programme.title: 再见明天

programme.title: 再见明天
programme.desc: 1992年宇宙物理学家HENRY与图书管理员慧慈相恋并偶然发现能启动时空循环的陨石但他的野心让两人关系紧张慧慈最终摧毁了陨石2023年HENRY意识到自己多么需要慧慈开始从不同宇宙收集她的眼泪试图重组她的意识如今三人与HENRY争夺保定球时球体破裂四人被送入更遥远的宇宙.

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

programme.title: Ekspedisi Ekstrem
programme.desc: Ekspedisi Ekstrem explores the human stories behind those living in unusual and extraordinary spaces. Each week, a celebrity guest will follow the host for a stay with communities living in remote, rugged terrains. Stepping out of their comfort zones, they will learn essential livelihood skills and be tasked with challenges that will test their skills and character. At the same time, Ekspedisi Ekstrem gives an intimate glimpse of the communities' unique dwellings and their ways to survive.
